why_not_blind_ready: The corpus is seeded from previously identified public evidence rather than broad pre-registered source collection.
Government source coverage is missing because commerce.gov blocked programmatic fetches from this environment.
why_prefilter_looks_thin: The current capital-flow prefilter is tuned for event-form first-pass discovery.
Company filing pages in this corpus are more useful as corroborating source material than as standalone first-pass capital-flow artifacts.
